meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Claude Code Setup to Solve No Marketing Skills
content.seo_description: Learn to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to automate marketing workflows, turning your code into a scalable product engine as a beginner developer.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to scale your apps. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you can automate content generation, SEO analysis, and social distribution. This setup turns your terminal into a growth engine, allowing you to focus on building while the AI handles the acquisition funnel.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks perfecting your codebase, but when you hit deploy, the silence is deafening. The 'build it and they will come' myth is the graveyard of student projects. You have the technical skills to build, but the lack of marketing reach keeps your innovations hidden from the world.

It is time to stop viewing marketing as a separate chore and start treating it as part of your engineering stack. By mastering the Claude Code and Antigravity workflow, you can automate your go-to-market strategy, transforming your terminal into a growth machine that works while you sleep.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a secure bridge between your local repository and the AI agent to ensure your marketing tasks have context-aware access to your codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a growth-tracking configuration that maps my current project features to potential user benefits for non-technical audiences.

steps.title: Persona-Driven Content Mapping
steps.description: Use Claude to analyze your README and source code to generate a target audience profile that aligns with your specific technical implementation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my repository and create a 3-tier user persona list. Define the primary pain point each persona faces that my project solves.

steps.title: SEO Metadata Automation
steps.description: Automate the creation of high-conversion SEO metadata and social media snippets directly from your component logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a set of SEO titles and meta descriptions for this project that emphasize value-driven outcomes rather than just technical features.

steps.title: Automated Outreach Scripting
steps.description: Craft personalized outreach messages that explain your project to potential users without sounding robotic or overly salesy.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft 5 cold-outreach templates for developers on Twitter/X that highlight the specific problem my project solves, keeping it under 280 characters.

steps.title: Feedback Loop Integration
steps.description: Set up a command that monitors your project's performance and suggests iterative marketing pivots based on real-world interaction data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a feedback loop script that monitors my project's documentation usage and suggests content updates based on common user questions.

pro_tips: Always feed your git commit history into Claude; it helps the AI understand the evolution of your project and write more authentic marketing updates.
Use 'dry-run' flags in your automation scripts to verify the marketing copy before it ever hits a public repository or social platform.
Treat your marketing prompts as 'Version 0' code—refactor them for clarity and impact just as you would with your production business logic.
Map your project's 'Time to Hello World' metric; if it takes more than 60 seconds to understand your app, your marketing copy is too complex.
Store your best-performing marketing prompts in a /marketing-prompts folder within your repo to maintain consistency across future project launches.
resources: SEO Best Practices for Developers: https://developers.google.com/search/docs
content.next_steps: Once your marketing automation is live, focus on building a 'public-in-public' habit by sharing your weekly Claude Code logs to your community.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your brilliant code gather dust in a private repo. By automating your growth, you gain the freedom to build more and worry less about visibility. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
